prompt.content:
Use the “matplotlib” Python library to generate the following plot.

The plot should be a 2D scatter plot using the “network_outages.csv” file. The axes of the scatter plot should be the duration of each outage and the number of subscribers impacted by each outage. Color all the points on the scatter plot based on the combination of each outage’s cause and severity. Before plotting the points, convert the duration of all outages from minutes to hours. Do not include any outages where less than 100 subscribers were impacted on the scatter plot. Also, exclude outages where the severity was low from the plot. Include the number of outages associated with each combination of outage cause and severity in the legend for the scatter plot.

Include the code you used to create the plot in a file in your response. Your code should save the requested plot to a PNG. Finally, please include the PNG generated by your code in your response.

rubrics.name: One of the axes of the 2D scatter plot is the duration of each network outage. (ver_2a646b22f7764c6c96bfb9b371aa8a56)

messages.content: One of the axes of the 2D scatter plot is the duration of each network outage.
